# Patterns (extended regex, matched against repo-relative paths) for files that are safe to drop
# from the production image build context, beyond the test/story/spec defaults baked into
# bin/dockerignore-drop-check.
#
# Adding a line here is the reviewed escape hatch: if a .dockerignore change intentionally excludes
# a non-test file and the guard fails, add the pattern here so reviewers see the acknowledgement in
# the diff. Keep entries narrow — a broad pattern re-opens the silent-drop hole the guard closes.
#
# Example:
#   ^docs/internal/.*\.md$
